questions.q: A recent study featured in the news on May 2, 2026, found that small doses of which antibiotic yielded good results in treating panic attacks by reducing inflammation in microglia?
According to a study published around May 2, 2026, replacing meat and dairy with alternatives can cut food-related emissions by what percentage?
A double-blind, placebo-controlled study circulating in early May 2026 found that the drug methylphenidate reduced what type of behavior among healthy adults?
A new UCSF study highlighted in May 2026 medical news found that rapid weight loss caused by GLP-1 drugs can lead to which side effect?
Research released in May 2026 revealed that mothers who lack a specific fatty acid in their blood during pregnancy are more likely to have children who develop what condition?
